caption: A man in a dark grey suit, light blue shirt, and silver tie stands in a brightly lit room with a blurred background, holding a black folder and gesturing with his right hand. The scene shifts to an indoor gathering where a man wearing a colorful, patterned button-down shirt is seen from behind, facing a woman with reddish-blonde hair wearing a dark jacket over a white top and a gold necklace. The setting changes to a wider view of the room, which features ornate gold-patterned wallpaper and framed pictures. Several people are present, including the man in the patterned shirt, a woman in a red dress, and a man in a white shirt. In the final sequence, the man in the patterned shirt remains in the foreground while another man in a green shirt and tie stands nearby, smiling and gesturing with his hands.
